category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison.

title.en: China-to-Netherlands EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入荷兰：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入荷蘭：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China EV charger documentation against Netherlands (NEN/ACM/TenneT) and EU CE framework expectations, including IEC 61851, IEC 62196-2 Type 2/CCS2 compatibility, electrical protection-device requirements, and national installation rules — relevant to one of Europe's densest EV charging networks served by DSOs Liander, Stedin and Enexis.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与荷兰（NEN/ACM/TenneT）及欧盟CE框架要求对照，涵盖IEC 61851、IEC 62196-2 Type 2/CCS2兼容性、保护装置要求和国家安装规则——荷兰拥有欧洲最密集的充电网络之一，由配电运营商Liander、Stedin和Enexis服务。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與荷蘭（NEN/ACM/TenneT）及歐盟CE框架要求對照，涵蓋IEC 61851、IEC 62196-2 Type 2/CCS2相容性、保護裝置要求和國家安裝規則——荷蘭擁有歐洲最密集的充電網絡之一，由配電運營商Liander、Stedin和Enexis服務。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, notified-body assessment, customs determination, electrical-installation design, grid-operator approval, or market-access approval. Exporters and installers should verify current Netherlands (NEN/ACM/TenneT) and EU-CE requirements before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、公告机构评审、海关裁定、电气安装设计、并网或市场准入批准。出口商和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行荷兰（NEN/ACM/TenneT）及欧盟CE相关要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、公告機構評審、海關裁定、電氣安裝設計、併網或市場准入批准。出口商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行荷蘭（NEN/ACM/TenneT）及歐盟CE相關要求。

answer_first.en: For Netherlands-bound EV chargers, the most critical gaps are Type 2/CCS2 connector alignment under IEC 62196, compatibility with AFIR obligations as implemented in the Netherlands, CE conformity evidence under LVD/EMC/RED where in scope, RCD/RDC protection, and NEN/DSO (Liander, Stedin, Enexis) installation and grid-operator coordination overseen by ACM. 230/400 V 50 Hz parameters are required for project readiness, Dutch-language documentation is often expected, and Rotterdam is the primary entry port for one of Europe's densest EV charging networks.
answer_first.zh: 对于荷兰，关键差距包括IEC 62196下Type 2与CCS2接口一致性、荷兰实施下AFIR义务、适用范围内的LVD/EMC/RED合规证据、RCD/RDC保护，以及在ACM监管下与NEN/配电运营商（Liander、Stedin、Enexis）并网/项目协调要求。须以230/400 V、50 Hz参数完成交付准备，通常要求荷兰语文件，鹿特丹为主要入境口岸，荷兰拥有欧洲最密集的充电网络之一。
answer_first.zht: 對於荷蘭，關鍵差距包括IEC 62196下Type 2與CCS2介面一致性、荷蘭實施下AFIR義務、適用範圍內的LVD/EMC/RED合規證據、RCD/RDC保護，以及在ACM監管下與NEN/配電運營商（Liander、Stedin、Enexis）併網/專案協調要求。須以230/400 V、50 Hz參數完成交付準備，通常要求荷蘭語文件，鹿特丹為主要入境口岸，荷蘭擁有歐洲最密集的充電網絡之一。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, notified body, customs, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
